greeting: Come in, come in! You must be half-frozen from the road.
There's always room at the hearth for a weary soul.
Sit yourself down, love. I'll fetch you something warm.
Welcome to The Millbrook Rest. Best pottage this side of the river.
quest: A peddler left a parcel here weeks ago and never returned. Would you see it delivered to the mill?
idle: I wonder if the barley shipment will arrive before market day.
